---
title: "Harper & Bros"
---

## Harper & Bros

**Type:** organization

### About

American publishers, founded in New York in 1817.  It is now (2011) part of HarperCollins, a division of News Corporation.  Its website is http://www.harpercollins.com/

### Letters Mentioning This Organization


---

[← Back to all letters](../letters.html)
